title: Top Ten Imported Veterinary Medicines – Quarterly Report 1 January to 31 March 2025
body: "   Product Active Ingredients Number of Certificates Issued Certificates issued as a percentage of the total this period     Artuvetrin® Therapy, suspension for subcutaneous injection in dogs.
